---
title: Monthly Employment
author: Mohsen
YEAR: r Sys.YEAR()
output:
  html_document:
    theme: readable    
    highlight: kate
    toc: true    
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: true    
    data_print: paged
    code_folding: hide    
    css: styles.css
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Set global options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = TRUE)
```

```{r loadlibraries, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tempdisagg)
library(zoo)
library(foreign)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)

```

```{r}
df <- read_csv("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/data/Long_Employment_NLSY79.csv")

df <- df %>%
  group_by(CASEID) %>%  # Replace 'individual_id' with your actual ID column
  arrange(week) %>%
  mutate(lEMPSTATUS_ = lag(status)) %>%
  ungroup()

df$weight <- ifelse(is.na(df$weight), 0, df$weight)
df$status <- ifelse(is.na(df$status), -1, df$status)
df$lEMPSTATUS_ <- ifelse(is.na(df$lEMPSTATUS_), -1, df$lEMPSTATUS_)

df$weight <- as.numeric(df$weight )
df$lEMPSTATUS_ <- as.numeric(df$lEMPSTATUS_)

# Sum of weights for lagged employment
sum_weight_lag_emp <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_lag_emp = sum(weight * 
                                     as.numeric((lEMPSTATUS_ >= 100 & lEMPSTATUS_ <= 2915) | lEMPSTATUS_ == 3 | lEMPSTATUS_ == 7),
                                     na.rm = TRUE))

# Sum of weights for lagged unemployment
sum_weight_lag_unemp <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_lag_unemp = sum(weight * 
                                       as.numeric(lEMPSTATUS_ == 2 | lEMPSTATUS_ == 4),
                                       na.rm = TRUE))       

# Sum of weights for lagged inactivity
sum_weight_lag_inac <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_lag_inac = sum(weight * 
                                      as.numeric(lEMPSTATUS_ == 5),
                                      na.rm = TRUE)) 



sum_weight_emp_to_unemp <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_emp_to_unemp = sum(weight * 
                                          as.integer(((lEMPSTATUS_ >= 100 & lEMPSTATUS_ <= 2915) | lEMPSTATUS_ == 3 | lEMPSTATUS_ == 7) & (status == 2 | status == 4)),
                                          na.rm = TRUE))

sum_weight_unemp_to_emp <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_unemp_to_emp = sum(weight * 
                                          as.integer((lEMPSTATUS_ == 2 | lEMPSTATUS_ == 4) & ((status >= 100 & status <= 2915) | status == 3 | status == 7)),
                                          na.rm = TRUE))
sum_weight_emp_to_inac <- df %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    summarise(sum_weight_emp_to_inac = sum(weight * 
                                        as.integer(((lEMPSTATUS_ >= 100 & lEMPSTATUS_ <= 2915) | lEMPSTATUS_ == 3 | lEMPSTATUS_ == 7) & (status == 5)),
                                        na.rm = TRUE))
sum_weight_inac_to_emp <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_inac_to_emp = sum(weight * 
                                         as.integer((lEMPSTATUS_ == 5) & ((status >= 100 & status <= 2915) | status == 3 | status == 7)),
                                         na.rm = TRUE))
sum_weight_unemp_to_inac <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_unemp_to_inac = sum(weight * 
                                           as.integer((lEMPSTATUS_ == 2 | lEMPSTATUS_ == 4) & (status == 5)),
                                           na.rm = TRUE))
sum_weight_inac_to_unemp <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_inac_to_unemp = sum(weight * 
                                           as.integer((lEMPSTATUS_ == 5) & (status == 2 | status == 4)),
                                           na.rm = TRUE))
                                     
sum_weight_all <- df %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(sum_weight_all = sum(weight, na.rm = TRUE))

TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP <- -log(1 - sum_weight_emp_to_unemp$sum_weight_emp_to_unemp / sum_weight_lag_emp$sum_weight_lag_emp)
TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP <- -log(1 - sum_weight_unemp_to_emp$sum_weight_unemp_to_emp / sum_weight_lag_unemp$sum_weight_lag_unemp)
TR_EMP_TO_INAC <- -log(1 - sum_weight_emp_to_inac$sum_weight_emp_to_inac / sum_weight_lag_emp$sum_weight_lag_emp)
TR_INAC_TO_EMP <- -log(1 - sum_weight_inac_to_emp$sum_weight_inac_to_emp / sum_weight_lag_inac$sum_weight_lag_inac)
TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC <- -log(1 - sum_weight_unemp_to_inac$sum_weight_unemp_to_inac / sum_weight_lag_unemp$sum_weight_lag_unemp)
TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP <- -log(1 - sum_weight_inac_to_unemp$sum_weight_inac_to_unemp / sum_weight_lag_inac$sum_weight_lag_inac)

TR <- data.frame(
  week = sum_weight_emp_to_unemp$week,  # Ensure this is the correct week alignment
  TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP,
  TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP,
  TR_EMP_TO_INAC,
  TR_INAC_TO_EMP,
  TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC,
  TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP
)



TR <- TR[order(TR$week), ]
TR$week <- as.numeric(as.character(TR$week))

TR <- TR %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date("1977-12-25") + weeks(week - 1)) # Subtract 1 because the week column likely starts from 1

TR <- TR %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date),
    week_of_year = week(date),
    year_month = floor_date(as.Date(date), "month"),
  )

head(TR)
```

```{r}

# List of transition rates and their labels
transitions <- list(
  TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP = "Employment to Unemployment",
  TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP = "Unemployment to Employment",
  TR_EMP_TO_INAC = "Employment to Inactivity",
  TR_INAC_TO_EMP = "Inactivity to Employment",
  TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC = "Unemployment to Inactivity",
  TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP = "Inactivity to Unemployment"
)

# Loop through each transition and create plots
for (tr in names(transitions)) {
  plot <- ggplot(TR, aes_string(x = "year_month", y = tr)) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 0.5) +
    labs(
      x = "Date",
      y = "Transition Rate",
      title = paste("Transition Rate from", transitions[[tr]])
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
  
  # Save the plot
  filename <- paste0("Transition_", gsub(" ", "_", transitions[[tr]]), "_Monthly.png")
  ggsave(filename, plot = plot, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, path = "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/")
}


mean_df <- TR %>%
  group_by(year_month) %>%
  summarise(
    tr_emp_to_unemp_mean = mean(TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP),
    tr_unemp_to_emp_mean = mean(TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP),
    tr_emp_to_inac_mean = mean(TR_EMP_TO_INAC),
    tr_inac_to_emp_mean = mean(TR_INAC_TO_EMP),
    tr_unemp_to_inac_mean = mean(TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC),
    tr_inac_to_unemp_mean = mean(TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP)
  )

# List of transition rates and their labels
transitions <- list(
  tr_emp_to_unemp_mean = "Employment to Unemployment",
  tr_unemp_to_emp_mean = "Unemployment to Employment",
  tr_emp_to_inac_mean = "Employment to Inactivity",
  tr_inac_to_emp_mean = "Inactivity to Employment",
  tr_unemp_to_inac_mean = "Unemployment to Inactivity",
  tr_inac_to_unemp_mean = "Inactivity to Unemployment"
)

# Loop through each transition and create plots
for (tr in names(transitions)) {
  plot <- ggplot(mean_df, aes_string(x = "year_month", y = tr)) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 0.5) +
    labs(
      x = "Date",
      y = "Transition Rate",
      title = paste("Mean Transition Rate from", transitions[[tr]])
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
  
  # Save the plot
  filename <- paste0("Transition_", gsub(" ", "_", transitions[[tr]]), "_Mean_Monthly.png")
  ggsave(filename, plot = plot, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, path = "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/")
}

```

```{r}

BLS <- read_dta("D:/PSID_SHELF/04_CPS/CPS-BLS/compare_psid/panel_cps.dta")

BLS$YEAR <- dmy(paste0("01-", BLS$YEAR))

cutoff_date <- ymd("1977-01-01")


BLS <- BLS[BLS$YEAR >= cutoff_date, ]

mean_df <- mean_df %>%
  rename(
    YEAR = year_month
  )

combined_df <- BLS %>%
  select(YEAR, tr_EU, tr_UE, tr_IE, tr_EI, tr_IU, tr_UI) %>%
  rename(
    BLS_EU_Transition_Rate = tr_EU,
    BLS_UE_Transition_Rate = tr_UE,
    BLS_IE_Transition_Rate = tr_IE,
    BLS_EI_Transition_Rate = tr_EI,
    BLS_IU_Transition_Rate = tr_IU,
    BLS_UI_Transition_Rate = tr_UI
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    mean_df %>%
      select(YEAR, tr_emp_to_unemp_mean) %>%
      rename(TR_EU_Transition_Rate = tr_emp_to_unemp_mean),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    mean_df %>%
      select(YEAR, tr_unemp_to_emp_mean) %>%
      rename(TR_UE_Transition_Rate = tr_unemp_to_emp_mean),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    mean_df %>%
      select(YEAR, tr_emp_to_inac_mean) %>%
      rename(TR_EI_Transition_Rate = tr_emp_to_inac_mean),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    mean_df %>%
      select(YEAR, tr_inac_to_emp_mean) %>%
      rename(TR_IE_Transition_Rate = tr_inac_to_emp_mean),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    mean_df %>%
      select(YEAR, tr_unemp_to_inac_mean) %>%
      rename(TR_UI_Transition_Rate = tr_unemp_to_inac_mean),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    mean_df %>%
      select(YEAR, tr_inac_to_unemp_mean) %>%
      rename(TR_IU_Transition_Rate = tr_inac_to_unemp_mean),
    by = "YEAR"
  )
print(head(combined_df$TR_UI_Transition_Rate  ))

```

```{r}

plot_and_save <- function(df, bls_col, tr_col, title, file_path, secondary_y_axis = TRUE) {
  
  df_clean <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[bls_col]]) & !is.na(.data[[tr_col]]))
  
  max_bls <- max(df_clean[[bls_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  min_bls <- min(df_clean[[bls_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  max_tr <- max(df_clean[[tr_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  min_tr <- min(df_clean[[tr_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- (max_bls - min_bls) / (max_tr - min_tr)
  shift <- min_bls - (min_tr * scale_factor)
 
  inv_transform <- function(x) (x - shift) / scale_factor

  p <- ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = YEAR)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[bls_col]], color = "BLS"), size = 1.2) +
    geom_line(aes(y = (.data[[tr_col]] * scale_factor) + shift, color = "NLSY79"), size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Dataset", values = c("BLS" = "blue", "NLSY79" = "red")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.y.left = element_text(color = "blue"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "red"),
      axis.text.y.left = element_text(color = "blue"),
      axis.text.y.right = element_text(color = "red"),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  if (secondary_y_axis) {
    p <- p + scale_y_continuous(
      name = "BLS Transition Rate",
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ inv_transform(.),name = "TR Transition Rate")  # Corrected formula for consistency
    )
  } else {
    p <- p + scale_y_continuous(name = "BLS Transition Rate")
  }
  
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

transitions <- list(
  list(bls_col = "BLS_EU_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_EU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_EU_vs_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_UE_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_UE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_UE_vs_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_EI_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_EI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate", filename = "tr_EI_vs_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_IE_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_IE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_IE_vs_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_UI_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_UI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate", filename = "tr_UI_vs_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_IU_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_IU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_IU_vs_bls.png")
)

# Loop through transitions and plot
for (t in transitions) {
  plot_and_save(
    df = combined_df,
    bls_col = t$bls_col,
    tr_col = t$tr_col,
    title = t$title,
    file_path = paste0("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/", t$filename),
    secondary_y_axis = TRUE
  )
}


############################################

transitions <- list(
  list(bls_col = "BLS_EU_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_EU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_EU_vs_bls"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_UE_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_UE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_UE_vs_bls"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_EI_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_EI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate", filename = "tr_EI_vs_bls"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_IE_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_IE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_IE_vs_bls"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_UI_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_UI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate", filename = "tr_UI_vs_bls"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_IU_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_IU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_IU_vs_bls")
)

plot_and_save <- function(df, bls_col, tr_col, title, file_path) {
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = YEAR)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[bls_col]], color = "BLS"), size = 1.2) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[tr_col]], color = "NLSY79"), size = 1.2) + 
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Dataset", values = c("BLS" = "blue", "NLSY79" = "red")) + 
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black"), 
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"), 
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )

  ggsave(filename = paste0(file_path, ".png"), plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

for (t in transitions) {
  plot_and_save(
    df = combined_df,
    bls_col = t$bls_col,
    tr_col = t$tr_col,
    title = t$title,
    file_path = paste0("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/", t$filename, "_single_axis")
  )
}

##########################################

# Function to plot comparisons using facets
plot_comparison_facets <- function(df, primary_col, secondary_col, title, file_path) {
  # Ensure specified columns exist in the data frame
  if (!(primary_col %in% names(df)) || !(secondary_col %in% names(df))) {
    stop("One or both specified columns do not exist in the data frame.")
  }
  
  # Prepare data for faceting by transforming to long format
  df_long <- df %>%
    select(YEAR, BLS = .data[[primary_col]], NLSY79 = .data[[secondary_col]]) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c("BLS", "NLSY79"), names_to = "Dataset", values_to = "Transition_Rate")
  
  # Filter out rows with missing transition rate values
  df_long <- df_long %>% filter(!is.na(Transition_Rate))
  
  # Abort if no data is available for plotting
  if (nrow(df_long) == 0) {
    stop("No data available after filtering out missing values.")
  }
  
  # Create the plot with ggplot2
  p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = YEAR, y = Transition_Rate, color = Dataset)) +
    geom_line(size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    facet_wrap(~ Dataset, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Dataset", values = c("BLS" = "blue", "NLSY79" = "red")) +
     theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black"),  
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black"),  
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  # Save the plot to the specified file path
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# Define a list of transition rates for comparison
transitions <- list(
  list(bls_col = "BLS_EU_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_EU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_EU_vs_facets_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_UE_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_UE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_UE_vs_facets_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_EI_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_EI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate", filename = "tr_EI_vs_facets_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_IE_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_IE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_IE_vs_facets_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_UI_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_UI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate", filename = "tr_UI_vs_facets_bls.png"),
  list(bls_col = "BLS_IU_Transition_Rate", tr_col = "TR_IU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate", filename = "tr_IU_vs_facets_bls.png")
)

# Loop over each transition type for plotting
for (tr in transitions) {
  plot_comparison_facets(
    combined_df, # Ensure this DataFrame is defined in your R environment
    primary_col = tr$bls_col,
    secondary_col = tr$tr_col,
    title = tr$title,
    file_path = paste0("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/", tr$filename)
  )
}
```

```{r}
mean(combined_df$BLS_EU_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$BLS_UE_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$BLS_EI_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$BLS_IE_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$BLS_UI_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$BLS_IU_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}

mean(combined_df$TR_EU_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$TR_UE_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$TR_EI_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$TR_IE_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$TR_UI_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$TR_IU_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}

write.csv(mean_df, "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/data/NLSY79_MEAN.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r calculate_transition_rates}
      
TR <- data.frame(
  week = sum_weight_emp_to_unemp$week,  # Ensure this is the correct week alignment
  sum_weight_emp_to_unemp,
  sum_weight_unemp_to_emp,
  sum_weight_emp_to_inac,
  sum_weight_inac_to_emp,
  sum_weight_unemp_to_inac,
  sum_weight_inac_to_unemp,
  sum_weight_all
)



TR <- TR[order(TR$week), ]
TR$week <- as.numeric(as.character(TR$week))



library(lubridate)
library(dplyr)

TR <- TR %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date("1977-12-25") + weeks(week - 1)) # Subtract 1 because the week column likely starts from 1

TR <- TR %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date),
    week_of_year = week(date),
    year_month = floor_date(as.Date(date), "month"),
  )

head(TR)


mean_df <- TR %>%
  group_by(year_month) %>%
  summarise(
    tr_emp_to_unemp_mean = mean(sum_weight_emp_to_unemp, na.rm = TRUE),
    tr_unemp_to_emp_mean = mean(sum_weight_unemp_to_emp, na.rm = TRUE),
    tr_emp_to_inac_mean = mean(sum_weight_emp_to_inac, na.rm = TRUE),
    tr_inac_to_emp_mean = mean(sum_weight_inac_to_emp, na.rm = TRUE),
    tr_unemp_to_inac_mean = mean(sum_weight_unemp_to_inac, na.rm = TRUE),
    tr_inac_to_unemp_mean = mean(sum_weight_inac_to_unemp, na.rm = TRUE),
    tr_sum_weight_all_mean = mean(sum_weight_all, na.rm = TRUE)  # Ensure 'sum_weight_all' is a column
  )


mean_df <-  mean_df %>%
  rename(
    YEAR = year_month
  )
      
TR <-  TR %>%
  rename(
    YEAR = year_month
  )

mean_df <- mean_df %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(YEAR),
    month = month(YEAR)
  )

# Compute transition rates
TR <- mean_df %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(
    TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP = (tr_emp_to_unemp_mean / tr_sum_weight_all_mean) ,
    TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP = (tr_unemp_to_emp_mean / tr_sum_weight_all_mean) ,
    TR_EMP_TO_INAC = (tr_emp_to_inac_mean / tr_sum_weight_all_mean) ,
    TR_INAC_TO_EMP = (tr_inac_to_emp_mean/ tr_sum_weight_all_mean) ,
    TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC = (tr_unemp_to_inac_mean / tr_sum_weight_all_mean) ,
    TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP = (tr_inac_to_unemp_mean/ tr_sum_weight_all_mean) 
  ) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)


TR_mean <- data.frame(lapply(TR, function(x) {
  if(is.character(x) | is.factor(x)) as.numeric(as.character(x)) else x
}))

# Compute column means, excluding non-numeric columns (like year and month)
numeric_columns <- TR_mean[, sapply(TR_mean, is.numeric)]
column_means <- colMeans(numeric_columns)
print(column_means)
```


```{r plot_transition_rates}
# Function to plot transition rates
plot_transition_rates <- function(df, transition_col, title) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = YEAR, y = !!sym(transition_col))) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1.5) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "none")
}

# Plot and save Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate
p_emp_to_unemp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP)), "TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP", "Transition Rate from Employment to Unemployment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/Transition_Employment_to_Unemployment.png", p_emp_to_unemp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate
p_unemp_to_emp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP)), "TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP", "Transition Rate from Unemployment to Employment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/Transition_Unemployment_to_Employment.png", p_unemp_to_emp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate
p_emp_to_inac <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_EMP_TO_INAC)), "TR_EMP_TO_INAC", "Transition Rate from Employment to Inactivity")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/Transition_Employment_to_Inactivity.png", p_emp_to_inac, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate
p_inac_to_emp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_INAC_TO_EMP)), "TR_INAC_TO_EMP", "

Transition Rate from Inactivity to Employment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/Transition_Inactivity_to_Employment.png", p_inac_to_emp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate
p_unemp_to_inac <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC)), "TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC", "Transition Rate from Unemployment to Inactivity")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/Transition_Unemployment_to_Inactivity.png", p_unemp_to_inac, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate
p_inac_to_unemp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP)), "TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP", "Transition Rate from Inactivity to Unemployment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/Transition_Inactivity_to_Unemployment.png", p_inac_to_unemp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r load_and_process_Fallick_and_Fleischman_data}
# Load Fallick_and_Fleischman data
Fallick_and_Fleischman <- read_excel("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/fallick_and_fleischman.xlsx")
Fallick_and_Fleischman <- Fallick_and_Fleischman %>%
  rename(YEAR = `Year:Mnth`) %>%
  mutate(YEAR = parse_date_time(YEAR, "ym")) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.)))) %>%
  mutate(across(c(EUpop, UEpop, NEpop, ENpop, NUpop, UNpop), ~ . / 100))
```

```{r combine_datasets}
# Combine transition rates with Fallick_and_Fleischman data
combined_df <- Fallick_and_Fleischman %>%
  select(YEAR, EUpop, UEpop, NEpop, ENpop, NUpop, UNpop) %>%
  rename(
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate = EUpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate = UEpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate = NEpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate = ENpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate = NUpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate = UNpop
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP) %>%
      rename(TR_EU_Transition_Rate = TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP) %>%
      rename(TR_UE_Transition_Rate = TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_INAC) %>%
      rename(TR_EI_Transition_Rate = TR_EMP_TO_INAC),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_EMP) %>%
      rename(TR_IE_Transition_Rate = TR_INAC_TO_EMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC) %>%
      rename(TR_UI_Transition_Rate = TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP) %>%
      rename(TR_IU_Transition_Rate = TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  )
```

```{r plot_comparison}
# Function to plot and save comparisons
plot_and_save <- function(df, Fallick_and_Fleischman_col, tr_col, title, file_path) {
  # Check if columns exist in the data frame
  if (!(Fallick_and_Fleischman_col %in% names(df)) || !(tr_col %in% names(df))) {
    stop("One or both specified columns do not exist in the data frame.")
  }

  # Remove rows with missing values in the specified columns
  df_clean <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[Fallick_and_Fleischman_col]]) & !is.na(.data[[tr_col]]))
  
  # Check if the data frame is empty after filtering
  if (nrow(df_clean) == 0) {
    stop("No data available after filtering out missing values.")
  }
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = YEAR)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[Fallick_and_Fleischman_col]], color = "Fallick and Fleischman"), size = 1.2) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[tr_col]], color = "NLSY79"), size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Dataset", values = c("Fallick and Fleischman" = "blue", "NLSY79" = "red")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black"), 
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"), 
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  # Save the plot
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# Plot comparisons
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate", "TR_EU_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/tr_EU_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate", "TR_UE_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/tr_UE_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate", "TR_EI_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/tr_EI_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate", "TR_IE_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/tr_IE_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate", "TR_UI_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/tr_UI_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate", "TR_IU_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/tr_IU_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)
```

```{r plot_comparison}

# Function to plot and compare with dual y-axes (use with caution)
plot_dual_axis <- function(df, secondary_col, primary_col, title, file_path) {
  # Ensure columns exist
  if (!(primary_col %in% names(df))) {
    stop(paste0("Primary column '", primary_col, "' does not exist in the data frame."))
  }
  
  if (!(secondary_col %in% names(df))) {
    stop(paste0("Secondary column '", secondary_col, "' does not exist in the data frame."))
  }
  
  # Include rows where either column has data
  df_clean <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[primary_col]]) | !is.na(.data[[secondary_col]]))
  
  # Check if the cleaned data frame is empty after filtering
  if (nrow(df_clean) == 0) {
    stop("No data available after filtering out missing values.")
  }
  
  # Calculate scaling and shifting factors for the secondary axis
  max_primary <- max(df_clean[[primary_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  min_primary <- min(df_clean[[primary_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  max_secondary <- max(df_clean[[secondary_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  min_secondary <- min(df_clean[[secondary_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- (max_primary - min_primary) / (max_secondary - min_secondary)
  shift <- min_primary - min_secondary * scale_factor
  
  # Create inverse transformation function for secondary axis
  inv_transform <- function(x) (x - shift) / scale_factor
  
  # Create the plot using ggplot
  p <- ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = YEAR)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[primary_col]], color = "Fallick and Fleischman"), size = 1.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[secondary_col]] * scale_factor + shift, color = "NLSY79"), size = 1.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Fallick and Fleischman Transition Rate",
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ inv_transform(.), name = "NLSY79 Transition Rate")
    ) +
    labs(x = "Year", title = title) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Dataset", values = c("Fallick and Fleischman" = "blue", "NLSY79" = "red")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.y.left = element_text(color = "blue"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "red"),
      axis.text.y.left = element_text(color = "blue"),
      axis.text.y.right = element_text(color = "red"),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  # Save the plot to the specified file path
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# Define a list of transition rates to compare
transition_rates <- list(
  list(primary = "TR_EU_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate", file = "tr_EU_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_UE_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate", file = "tr_UE_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_EI_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate", file = "tr_EI_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_IE_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate", file = "tr_IE_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_UI_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate", file = "tr_UI_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_IU_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate", file = "tr_IU_dual_axis.png")
)

# Loop through the transition rates and generate the plots
for (tr in transition_rates) {
  plot_dual_axis(
    combined_df,
    tr$primary,
    tr$secondary,
    tr$title,
    paste0("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/", tr$file)
  )
}

```

```{r}

# Function to plot comparisons using facets
plot_comparison_facets <- function(df, primary_col, secondary_col, title, file_path) {
  # Ensure specified columns exist in the data frame
  if (!(primary_col %in% names(df)) || !(secondary_col %in% names(df))) {
    stop("One or both specified columns do not exist in the data frame.")
  }
  
  # Prepare data for faceting by transforming to long format
  df_long <- df %>%
    select(YEAR, Fallick_and_Fleischman = .data[[secondary_col]], NLSY79 = .data[[primary_col]]) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c("Fallick_and_Fleischman", "NLSY79"), names_to = "Dataset", values_to = "Transition_Rate")
  
  # Filter out rows with missing transition rate values
  df_long <- df_long %>% filter(!is.na(Transition_Rate))
  
  # Abort if no data is available for plotting
  if (nrow(df_long) == 0) {
    stop("No data available after filtering out missing values.")
  }
  
  # Create the plot with ggplot2
  p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = YEAR, y = Transition_Rate, color = Dataset)) +
    geom_line(size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    facet_wrap(~ Dataset, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Dataset", values = c("Fallick_and_Fleischman" = "blue", "NLSY79" = "red")) +
     theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black"),  
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black"),  
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  # Save the plot to the specified file path
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}


# Define a list of transition rates to compare
transition_rates <- list(
  list(primary = "TR_EU_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate", file = "tr_EU_facets_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_UE_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate", file = "tr_UE_facets_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_EI_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate", file = "tr_EI_facets_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_IE_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate", file = "tr_IE_facets_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_UI_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate", file = "tr_UI_facets_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_IU_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate", file = "tr_IU_facets_axis.png")
)

# Generate plots
for (tr in transition_rates) {
  plot_comparison_facets(
    combined_df,
    tr$primary,
    tr$secondary,
    tr$title,
    paste0("D:/PSID_SHELF/02_NLSY79/output/Mean_Compare/", tr$file)
  )
}

```

```{r}
mean(TR_mean$TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(TR_mean$TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(TR_mean$TR_EMP_TO_INAC, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(TR_mean$TR_INAC_TO_EMP, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(TR_mean$TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(TR_mean$TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP, na.rm = TRUE)

```


```{r}
mean(combined_df$Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(combined_df$Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate, na.rm = TRUE)

```
